banner.title: CBSE EXAMS POSTPONED (MAR 5–6)
banner.subtitle: Circular-2 dated Mar 3 (CBSE) — 7 Gulf countries affected

cbse.summary: CBSE has postponed Class 10 and Class 12 board exams scheduled for Mar 2 and (per Circular-2 dated Mar 3) also for Mar 5–6, 2026 in 7 Middle East countries. Fresh dates will be announced later; next review is Mar 5 for exams from Mar 7 onwards.
cbse.issuedBy: Controller of Examinations, Dr. Sanyam Bhardwaj

meaCentral.description: Ministry of External Affairs 24/7 Situation Room

airlines.name: Air India
airlines.crisisNote: Flights to/from Iran suspended until further notice. Other Gulf routes operating with delays.

airlines.name: IndiGo
airlines.crisisNote: Iran routes suspended. Gulf operations partially disrupted. Waiver applicable for affected routes.

airlines.name: SpiceJet
airlines.crisisNote: Flights to Iran cancelled. Dubai and other Gulf routes subject to change.

airlines.name: Emirates
airlines.crisisNote: Flights to/from Tehran suspended. Dubai hub operating. Check status before travel.

airlines.name: Etihad Airways
airlines.crisisNote: Iran operations suspended. Abu Dhabi hub operating normally.

airlines.name: Air India Express
airlines.crisisNote: Iran routes suspended. Gulf operations ongoing with some delays.

airlines.name: flydubai
airlines.crisisNote: Some routes to Iran suspended. Other Gulf routes operating.

airlines.name: Qatar Airways
airlines.crisisNote: Iranian airspace restrictions impacting some routes. Doha hub operating.

airlines.name: Akasa Air
airlines.crisisNote: Monitoring Gulf situation. Some routes subject to disruption.

advisories.title: CBSE Exams Postponed for Mar 5–6 in Gulf Countries
advisories.summary: CBSE Circular-2 dated Mar 3 postpones Class 10 & 12 exams on Mar 5–6, 2026 for 7 Gulf nations. New dates TBA; next review Mar 5.

advisories.title: MEA Activates 24/7 Situation Room for Gulf Crisis
advisories.summary: Ministry of External Affairs has activated its round-the-clock situation room. Indians in Gulf can call +91-11-23012113 or WhatsApp +91-9868407977.

advisories.title: Iran Airspace Restrictions: Multiple Airlines Suspend Flights
advisories.summary: Air India, IndiGo, Emirates, and other carriers have suspended or rerouted flights due to Iranian airspace closure. Check with your airline before travel.

advisories.title: Indian Nationals Advised to Register on MADAD Portal
advisories.summary: MEA urges all Indian nationals in affected Gulf countries to register on the MADAD portal for consular assistance and emergency tracking.

advisories.title: UAE: Indian Consulate Dubai Issues Safety Advisory
advisories.summary: Consulate General of India, Dubai advises Indian community to stay indoors, avoid large gatherings, and keep emergency numbers saved.

advisories.title: Qatar Airways Rerouting Flights Due to Airspace Restrictions
advisories.summary: Qatar Airways is rerouting certain flights to avoid affected airspace, causing extended flight times. Passengers are advised to check flight status.

advisories.title: Kuwait Embassy: Helpline Activated for Indian Nationals
advisories.summary: Embassy of India in Kuwait City has activated dedicated helplines for Indian nationals. Call +965-99006777 for assistance.

advisories.title: Oman: Situation Stable, Precautionary Advisories Issued
advisories.summary: Oman remains relatively stable. Indian Embassy in Muscat has issued precautionary advisories asking nationals to stay alert and register on MADAD.

disclaimer: This hub aggregates publicly available information for general awareness only. Always verify critical information with official sources (embassies, airlines, CBSE, MEA). Emergency situations evolve rapidly; information may not reflect the most current status. For life-threatening emergencies, contact local emergency services immediately.
